portrait.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG NPC portrait, bust shot of Okia — seafood chef, food buff provider. plump build, brown skin, black hair in bun, wide cheerful grin. Wearing chef apron with headband, ladle and knife at waist. Holding/carrying large pot (always steaming), fish basket. Special details: apron always stained, constant steam rising. Expression: jovial and insistently generous. Set in Britalia region with harbor, ocean, pirate atmosphere. 256x256 pixel art style, dark gradient background, game dialogue portrait. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
